name: PartKit Importer & Syncer
description: Atomically import, preview, and sync KiCad component libraries (symbols, footprints, 3D models) with real-time pin-to-pad checking.
description_full:
PartKit is a utility designed to solve the workflow of importing KiCad components downloaded from Ultra Librarian, SnapEDA, SamacSys, and Octopart. It launches a local web application featuring: 
- Real-time symbol pin to footprint pad hover mapping.
- Real-time 3D model visual offset alignment sliders.
- Strict validation engine ensuring pin-pad mapping matches and duplicate items are checked.
- Local component indexing database browser showing checksums, manufacturers, and datasheets.
- Zero KiCad library table manipulation required.
